title: 海盗王
description: Pirate King: Pirate Continent, as a full 3DQ online game, is set against the backdrop of a pirate navy battle. The game is divided into two guild factions: the navy and the pirates. The game characters are guided by upgrading and refining equipment and props, coupled with rich career settings, so that every player can find their own position in the game. The game adopts a real-time combat system and incorporates the gameplay of guild dungeon real-time battles, presenting a legendary life of pirates and navy confrontation. The game features diverse interactive functions such as unique social actions and expressions.
description_short: The game adopts a real-time combat system, allowing players to choose to join the navy or pirate guild, presenting a legendary life of the navy fighting against pirates. The game has a rich trading system.
